name: Applesauce Prune Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat margarine and sugar until light and creamy. Add egg.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients. If desired, add 1/2 teaspoon salt.
3. Add prunes and nuts to the dry mixture, then combine this with the batter.
4. Blend in applesauce.
5. Bake in a greased 9-cup Bundt pan at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until done.
6. Let cool on a rack in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto serving dishes.
7. Sprinkle with sifted powdered sugar. For an attractive finish, use a paper doily with decorative cuts.
This recipe is attributed to Jo Anne Merrill and has a preparation time of approximately 1 hour and 15 minutes.
